content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift SecureField), but review_information contains placeholder credentials (demo_user.txt: "test", demo_password.txt: "changeme") and notes.txt is just "TBD".
Pierre: Apple's reviewers cannot test past the login screen with placeholder credentials, which almost guarantees a rejection under 2.1 for "unable to sign in." You need to provide a real, working demo account plus notes explaining any steps to reach gated features. Please replace these placeholders before submission.
